metadata.description: AI skills marketplace: governed AI-SDLC suite (governance + autopilot + MCP + hooks) + intel-analysis. Catalog version bumps on every plugin change (enforced by plugins/catalog_check.py).

plugins.name: ai-sdlc-suite
plugins.description: 一鍵大補帖:ai-sdlc 治理 + ai-sdlc-autopilot 自動駕駛(含實際操作驗收)+ MCP server(治理工具供給)+ hooks(選配,預設 warn)。Governed AI-SDLC suite bundle.

plugins.name: intel-analysis
plugins.description: 情報分析方法論大補帖:十步驟框架(SKILL-01〜20)+ 23 條核心紀律 + 檔案化預測驗證帳本(版本鏈、Brier 校準);對齊 ICD 203/206 與 NATO Admiralty 評級;決策保險節(輕量 MDCOA)。Intelligence-analysis methodology bundle.
